name: Private Company Research
description_en: Multi-agent deep-research framework for non-public companies, using first-principles questions and sparse-public-data triangulation.
description_zh: 针对非上市公司的多 Agent 深度研究框架，运用第一性原理提问与稀疏公开数据三角验证。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It researches private companies where public data is scarce, focusing on customer value, recurrence, replicability, and management quality rather than fabricated precision.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。在公开资料稀缺的场景下研究非上市公司，聚焦客户价值、复购、可复制性与管理层质量，而非制造虚假的精确度。
sec_note_en: Spawns background subagents and performs web searches for public records about private companies. No external accounts required; confidence levels are explicitly labeled.
sec_note_zh: 会启动后台子代理，并执行网络搜索获取非上市公司的公开记录。无需外部账号；置信度会明确标注。
